name: review-gate-pod
description: Verification-focused team for reviewing an existing branch, feature, or artifact without defaulting into redesign.

overlay.promptSuffix: Act as the primary review gate. Focus on correctness, scope, regressions, and clear approval/rejection outcomes. Stay read-only.
Act as executable QA. Run validation plans, reproduce bugs, and attach evidence that helps fixes land faster.
Only engage when reviewer or QA identifies fixable issues that require code changes. Keep fixes narrowly scoped to findings.

bootContext.teamDescription: Review and acceptance team for auditing already-existing work before sign-off.
bootContext.initialObjective: Verify the current artifact against acceptance criteria, surface risks clearly, and only spawn fix work if findings require it.
sharedContext: Assume code already exists; default action is verify, not redesign.
Reviewer owns the decision narrative; QA owns executable evidence and repro quality.
If a fix is required, master creates a bounded follow-up task instead of expanding review scope inline.
Approval requires both a scope/correctness read and an evidence-backed validation pass.
commandChain: user -> master -> reviewer -> qa-engineer -> master -> user
